distance_km.note: Recent sources indicate 62km for the main races (classic and freestyle) in 2025, changed from previous lengths for snow security; database's 50km does not match current distance (tolerance ±3km exceeded)

elevation_m.note: No reliable sources found specifying total elevation gain; described as demanding with rolling terrain and height differences in Salpausselkä ridge, but no numeric value

country.note: Confirmed as Finland across multiple sources

region_state_province.note: Held in Lahti, which is in Päijät-Häme region; Salpausselkä area in Lahti confirmed

discipline.note: Both classic and freestyle (skate) offered, including 62km in each technique

field_size.note: Historical high of 13,226 in 1984 and 1,334 in first race noted, but no typical/average ~750 confirmed; called Finland's largest mass event but no current typical number

founded.note: First edition 1974, not 1923; multiple sources confirm 1974 inception, 52nd time in 2025

official_website.note: www.finlandiahiihto.fi explicitly listed as official site

race_date.note: Typically late February; e.g., Feb 22-23 2025, Feb 12-13 noted, annual in February
